description_long: This is a young adult pedestrian dressed in modern, tactical-inspired urban attire. The individual wears a hooded jacket with padded sleeves, cropped cargo pants, and a large, structured backpack with multiple compartments and visible straps. A prominent gas mask with visible filters covers the lower half of the face, and there are fingerless gloves on both hands. The person is holding a small object, possibly a tool or device, in the right hand, and wears high-top, thick-soled sneakers. The overall appearance suggests preparedness for urban exploration or hazardous environments, with a focus on utility and protection.
description: A young adult in tactical urban clothing with a gas mask, large backpack, and high-top sneakers, holding a small object in one hand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gas mask, hooded jacket, gloves, and the object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the gas mask, the full depth of the backpack, and the cropped pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backpack with multiple straps and the back of the hooded jacket.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the gas mask profile, backpack, and the object held in the right hand.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical hooded jacket, cropped cargo pants, fingerless gloves, utility accessories
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in a loose, voluminous manner
